SURESH PERUMAL
Bangalore, Karnataka | +91 9346142860 | psuresh9346@gmail.com | LinkedIn Profile
SUMMARY
Computer Science graduate with strong foundations in software development, Python
programming, and front-end web technologies. Experienced in building data-driven applications
and developing responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Skilled in
implementing machine learning models, integrating APIs, and managing structured datasets.
Demonstrates strong problem-solving ability, debugging skills, and experience writing clean,
maintainable code. Familiar with SQL databases, version control using Git, and modern software
development practices. Passionate about developing scalable applications that combine efficient
backend logic with intuitive user interfaces.
EDUCATION

2021 – 2025 | BTech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) | CGPA: 8.20
Sri Vivekananda Junior College
2019 – 2021 | Higher Secondary Education | Percentage: 77.5%
Sri Viswam Public High School
2019 | Secondary School Education | CGPA: 9.80
PROJECTS
Real-Time Detection of Diabetic Eye Disorders Using Deep Learning December 2024 – May 2025
• Developed a machine learning-based application using Python to detect eye diseases from medical
images.
• Performed data preprocessing and feature engineering to improve model performance.
• Built a responsive front-end interface using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to display predictions
and results.
• Integrated the frontend UI with backend prediction logic using API calls.
• Implemented modular code structure to maintain clean and scalable application architecture.
• Conducted debugging and testing to ensure accurate predictions and stable application performance.
• Documented the system workflow, implementation process, and evaluation methodology.
• Project Link
Brain Tumor Detection Using CNN January 2024 – June 2024
• Built a neural network-based classification model using Python for detecting brain tumors.
• Managed the data processing pipeline including cleaning, transformation, and preprocessing.
• Designed a user-friendly web interface for uploading and analyzing medical images.
• Integrated REST API communication between frontend and backend services.
